description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban architecture. The exterior is finished in a combination of light beige and white, with stone accents along the rooftop parapet and balcony railings. The structure includes two main stories and a rooftop terrace, accessible via a small rooftop enclosure. Large windows with dark awnings are symmetrically arranged on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is sheltered by a flat overhang supported by columns, leading to a spacious balcony above the garage area. Metal railings enclose the rooftop and balcony, enhancing safety while maintaining an open, airy feel.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, stone-accented railings, and large windows with dark awnings. The design features a rooftop terrace, a sheltered entryway, and a spacious balcony.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entryway, balcony above the garage, and rooftop terrace with stone and metal railings.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the rooftop enclosure, side balcony, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the flat roof, rooftop terrace, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the main facade, double rows of windows, and the sheltered entryway with columns.
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered entryway with flat overhang, supported by columns, and a balcony above; simple modern door with minimal decorative elements.
